description: A delivery of windows arrives on site, but the foreman notices several are cracked. The delivery must be rejected.

nodes.task_description: Document the damage by taking photos of the cracked windows.

expected_outcome.expected: Photographic evidence of the damage is captured.

nodes.task_description: Update the status of the purchase order to 'Delivery Rejected - Damaged'.

expected_outcome.expected: The PO status is updated in the procurement system.

nodes.task_description: Notify the supplier of the rejection and attach the photos, requesting an immediate replacement shipment.

expected_outcome.expected: The supplier is formally notified of the issue and a replacement is requested.
